case_title: MARTINEZ, JEAN PAUL et al VS ZAMBRANO, GUADALUPE (DRIVER) et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MARTINEZ, JEAN PAUL MARTINEZ, SEBASTIAN J. AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMBRANO, GUADALUPE (DRIVER) JACKSON, JOSEPH (OWNER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-1999 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION BY PLTF.JEAN PAUL MATINEZ FILED. RE: DEFENDANTS WERE NOT SERVED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-18-1999, OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-23-1999 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMBRANO, GUADALUPE (DRIVER)
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JACKSON, JOSEPH (OWNER)
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-23-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-24-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-24-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-23-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, JEAN PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZAMBRANO, GUADALUPE (DRIVER) JACKSON, JOSEPH (OWNER) $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,095.00, SEBASTIAN J. MARTINEZ IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
